name: Majors Creek Solar Power Station

timeline.title: EPC contractor appointed — DT Infrastructure
timeline.detail: 150 MW solar + 600 MWh BESS. Combined project with Ganymirra. ~420 jobs, AU$450m+. Construction H1 2026, ops 2028.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2029-02 to 2029-02-01 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: DT Infrastructure preferred EPC 16 Mar 2026 (Edify 1.8 GW EPC package). 'Early pre-construction and design works' underway; construction 'in coming months'; ops 2028. Status upgraded from prior 'fid' to 'cisa_signed' — EPC in place but no public FID confirmation.

Second CIS win on Majors Creek site — this time T8 Dispatchable (May 2026). Additionality question worth verifying: is this the same underlying project or a separate BESS-heavy expansion? Just awarded — pre-CISA.

operational_notes: Edify Energy now owned by La Caisse (Canadian institutional investor). CIS T1 award: 150 MW solar + 600 MWh BESS. Twin project to Ganymirra. DT Infrastructure named preferred EPC 16 Mar 2026 (part of Edify's 1.8 GW / 3.6 GWh EPC package covering Majors Creek + Ganymirra + Smoky Creek + Guthrie's Gap). 'Early pre-construction and design works' underway; construction 'in coming months'; ops target 2028.
